policy.benchmark_boundary: Deck 607 evidence is retained as benchmark context but excluded from actionable axis counts.
policy.cycle_boundary: High recycled cut-source counts with all seeded roles exhausted require role-axis learning before more same-deck source search.
policy.engine_axis_boundary: An exhausted engine axis remains evidence, but it is suppressed as the next action until new card-level evidence exists.
policy.global_boundary: Axis evidence groups multiple commanders and variants so one deck cannot become the global objective function.
policy.pivot_boundary: This report chooses a learning axis only; it does not add, cut, copy, battle, or promote decks.
policy.role_axis_boundary: Any exhausted role axis remains evidence, but it is suppressed as the next action until new card-level evidence exists.
